programme.title: Untold
programme.desc: Journalist Tir Dhondy investigates the gangs recruiting young British women as drug mules to smuggle huge quantities of cannabis from party destination Thailand back to the UK

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox, David Wilson and Dr Graham Hill investigate the murder of Janine Downes, a 22-year-old mother of three and sex worker from Wolverhampton. On a freezing cold February evening in 1991, Janine was working in the red-light district and was seen climbing into a distinctive blue car. Hours later her naked and beaten corpse was discovered in a Shropshire layby. David and Emilia interview key witnesses and look for clues in Wolverhampton's red-light district - was Janine the victim of a potential serial killer?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect catches up with designer Max McMurdo, who converted a shipping container into a garden office. This time, Max has gone back to his old school in Bedford to create a classroom out of two more of the containers. George also visits a prototype for a mini home so small it can be driven on the back of a truck, and in Somerset, he meets a couple who have turned a vintage vehicle into a mobile cinema business

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Susie and Bill convert a small barn in Devon to try and make the best use of the space. Dannie and Grace prepare to welcome Barry the boar

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Norman and Cliff have an argument leading to monkey business with an orang-utan, and nobody believes Woody when he tells the bar regulars he has met actor Robert Urich. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca gets a job arranging a party for one of her bosses, and reluctantly agrees to hire Sam and Woody as bartenders - but the event proves to be a disaster. Kirstie Alley and Woody Harrelson star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's daughter-in-law Annie fills in for her at the bar, while Rebecca is furious another temporary waitress named Laurie gets more attention than she does

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reluctantly agrees to do charity work at a hospital, but proves so popular with the patients that he starts spending more time with them than at home - much to wife Debra's dismay. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's mother and father turn up unexpectedly, intending to take their daughter back home with them. They are less than happy to find Ray there, let alone his parents, and the atmosphere is tense as the families take an instant dislike to each other

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne falls out with Sherry and flees the apartment after the two have a blazing row. With nowhere else to go, she asks if she can spend the night at Niles's flat, leaving him quaking with excitement. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris - and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, though, he begins to regret his impulsiveness. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Niles asks him whether he should stay with Maris, Frasier wanders the streets in film-noir fashion to find an answer for his long-suffering brother. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting the Isle of Wight to meet a couple who have lots of unwanted militaria in their sheds. While Henry embarks on an ambitious project to turn tank parts into hanging baskets, Simon plans to transform old insulators into studio flat lighting

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in the Limousin install a £10,000 septic tank, and a couple move ahead with plans for a sustainable lifestyle by buying hens. Plus, the progress of two estate agents who have spent 30 years rejuvenating a village in Portugal

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Julie and Leo are looking for a holiday home to suit three generations of their family. Leah Charles-King takes them and their budget of £120,000 to the southern Costa Blanca with hopes of finding the perfect property

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Golf professional Peter from Hertfordshire takes his wife Judy on a well-deserved break, exploring the fun side of the Florida Keys for their wedding anniversary. Holly juggles medieval business and pleasure on Florida's Gulf Coast and fire captain David hosts an Easter egg hunt

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Montespieu, Louisa and Roger want to create a stunning new suite before a wedding, but a secret tower room and a locked safe could spell trouble. At Château de la Ruche, Tim and Rebecca want to transform a tired, neglected outbuilding into a potting shed in preparation for Rebecca's first ever flower retreat

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Rodriguez sisters Sophie and Charlotte have the tricky task of finding a holiday home that combines plenty of inside space and a lively location close to all the action for clients Jill from Lisburn and her best pal Silvana. In Murcia, Darren and Natalie Brown are hoping to swing the perfect deal for golf-mad Brian and his wife Nikki, who wish to invest in a holiday home that could one day become a permanent base

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for properties in west London. Philip is with Jody and Shane, originally from Canada and Australia. They have a healthy £1 million budget, although they do need a house big enough to accommodate their large international family they come to visit. Kirstie helps Roopal and Hershil, who are living with their respective parents and want a place of their own before they tie the knot in just a couple of months' time. For these foodies it's all about cooking and entertaining space. Can Kirstie find them a house with all the right ingredients?

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: David tries to make amends while a guarded Anna attempts to keep her distance, and a series of uncomfortable encounters leaves her questioning whether she has made the right choice. David is faced with a difficult congregant and must confront some demons of his own

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces reviews shows including Is It Cake, Too?, Hijack, Five Star Kitchen: Britain's Next Great Chef, Saving Giraffes: The Long Journey Home, Steph's Packed Lunch, Dr Pimple Popper, Magic Numbers: Hannah Fry's Mysterious World of Maths, and the ITV News. Featuring Martin and Roman Kemp, Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Mo Gilligan with Babatunde Aléshé, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Melanie C and her brother Paul, Paul Sinha and his husband Olly, Jon Richardson and Lucy Beaumont, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, and Zoe Ball, Johnny Ball and Woody Cook. From July 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on the Eurovision Song Contest, Race Across the World, Jamie's Ultimate BBQ, Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly, Widow's Bay, Trading Places and Police Interceptors. They also watch the news reports about the Labour Party leadership speculation

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part fact-based crime drama. Best friends Gagandip and Ravi fell in love with student doctor Mundill, a love triangle that destroyed their friendship and ultimately ended in what the headlines called the honeytrap murder. Gagandip attempted to sexually assault Mundill, who conspired with Ravi on a revenge plot that went horribly wrong. Starring Dee Ahluwalia, Ikky Kabir and Sasha Desouza-Willock

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part two of two. At trial, Mundill was characterised as manipulative and ruthless. Mundill, Ravi and Ravi's accomplice Darren Peters were all charged with murder but ended up with different convictions and wildly different sentences. Drawing on police interviews, text messages, court documents and original interviews, this factual drama presents a complex picture of crime and punishment

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Flamin' Hot (2023)
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, Richard Montanez works as a cleaner in California for Frito Lay, the snack giant responsible for many popular brands. Montanez suggests a spicy twist to one of the company's most popular lines, giving birth to Flamin' Hot Cheetos, which becomes a pop culture phenomenon. Director Eva Longoria's fact-based comedy drama, starring Jesse Garcia and Annie Gonzalez

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. Jamie cooks a traybaked salmon in a bag, tomato fritters that can be prepared in a frying pan, and roasted rolled pork with a risotto that are both cooked in the same casserole pan

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Susie and Bill soldier on with their barn conversion, but feel the pressure to make it liveable quickly so they can move in

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca thinks that she is in with a chance with Evan Drake when he invites her and Sam for a weekend aboard his yacht. Comedy, starring Ted Danson, Kirstie Alley and Tom Skerritt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: To All the Girls I've Loved Before
programme.desc: The gang throws Frasier and Lilith stag and hen parties, but after hearing grim stories about marriage, the groom begins to question his decision to walk down the aisle

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm repaints Evan Drake's house while he is away, and gives Rebecca the chance to come over and look at his bedroom, but things go awry when Drake returns home early

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra throws a bridal shower for Amy, but Marie tries to take over and monopolises the event. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A message mistakenly left on an answering machine leads to a possible romance for Frasier, who rushes off to the airport to meet the caller. Guest starring Linda Hamilton, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A cancelled date leaves Niles, Martin and Daphne suspecting Frasier's supermodel escort is just a figment of his fevered imagination - so he tries to provide photographic evidence of the relationship. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier go gift-shopping with a vengeance as Martin's 65th birthday approaches, vying with each other to be the apple of their father's eye on his big day. Starring John Mahoney, Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Niles throws a fancy-dress Halloween party with a literary theme as a benefit for the Library Association, which he attends dressed as Cyrano de Bergerac, while a misunderstanding lets one or two skeletons out of the closet. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah & Mason's, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentine's Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Cumbria, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit collector Paula, who badly needs some cash to fix her leaking roof. Henry picks a Morris Minor for restoration, while Simon turns some unwanted wood into furniture that seriously impresses independent valuer Ronnie Archer-Morgan

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a village in France officially open after two years of renovations. Cameras catch up with the man who rescued an abandoned hamlet in Spain who could now lose half of what he bought. Meanwhile, in Portugal, a couple start an animal sanctuary in their village

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul from south London has a lifelong dream to own a holiday home in the sun, where he can escape the winter and spend quality time with family and friends. Now that he's finally ready to take the leap, he's asked Ben Hillman to help him find the perfect property on Spain's southern Costa Blanca. He's also brought along his best friend Coral to help him with the search. Ben has five great options for Paul's budget of £80,000 - will any of them hit the mark?

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Liverpool man Lea reveals how 22 years ago he left a career in IT to move to Pasadena to run the Horse and Jockey pub and restaurant. Meanwhile, golf professional Peter is living the good life, earning much more money and working fewer hours doing a job he loves in the sunshine, and 74-year-old former estate agent Lynne from London is now enjoying life in The Villages - the largest retirement community in the world

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Montespieu, Louisa and Roger continue work on their Gingko Suite, but a shocking bathroom discovery could change everything. Debbie and Dave's craft room is derailed, while Donna and Paul are pushed to their limits after struggling to haul a standalone roll-top bath up three floors

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, young-at-heart clients Damien and Georgina are ready to build a new life in Spain. They come armed with bags of enthusiasm, a can-do attitude - but a very low budget. On the Costa Blanca, a more sizable sum is available to hunt out the perfect family villa for West Sussex couple Chris and Nicola and their three sons

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds
programme.desc: George helps people across the country make the most of their space and design innovative homes. In Bromley, south London, George is helped by garden designer Luke Millard to come up with a stunning extension to include a gorgeous kitchen featuring curved arches for seasoned renovators Mitch and Elliot. An inspirational garden design is also part of their ambitious dream, but even for the most experienced home renovators, the best-laid plans can go awry as a flood scuppers their plans

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another bunch of challenges for the celebrities, as a result of which Joanna Page does something startling with a pineapple, Armando Iannucci does something confusing with a nursery rhyme and Amy Gledhill does something unexpected with balls of ice. As if that wasn't enough, Kumail Nanjiani reveals his missing body part. Greg Davies dishes out the points

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Comedy starring Sam Campbell. A hotshot director scours the country for everyday people with feature film ideas before racing against the clock to turn the idea into reality in just three days. Sam and his elite team set about bringing Mick Hall's incomprehensible concept - featuring a detective and real snakes - to the big screen. But it turns out that some people don't make good actors, and snakes have a tendency to bite

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: The residents of Smiling Spring Care Home want to make a sci-fi epic about a group of retirees who go inside a computer to defeat online scammers. But the shoot goes sideways when Pat makes moves on a wealthy resident, Winnie gets challenged to a fight and Jess discovers that she's truly terrible with old people

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Engineer Ellie and nuclear project manager Callum are both self-confessed nerds. But will their quiet chemistry prove the perfect solution? Author and dating expert Beckie is ready to leave toyboys behind, as she meets romantic poet Paul. DJ John wants to relight his love life. He's matched with high-energy environmentalist Susha. Seventy-two-year-old Andy hopes to strike the right balance with footballer Jan

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The story of a man whose partner convinced him she had terminal cancer, and that she had a miscarriage. Devastated by the news, he doubled down on supporting her and goes to work renovating the home of her friend. What he discovers at that house unravels the many layers of deception that she has been weaving

programme.title: Second Act (2018)
programme.desc: A lack of a college degree costs a woman with an abundance of street smarts a promotion in her job despite her success. Her godson responds by creating a fake profile for her that details a Harvard education and world travel, but there is a big surprise in store for her in her new role at a corporate firm. Romantic comedy, starring Jennifer Lopez, Milo Ventimiglia and Vanessa Hudgens

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: James and Jodie are pushing to get one room habitable in their dilapidated old farmhouse, while Dave learns how to keep sheep that are going to be shown in competition

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier helps Carla overcome her terror of flying, while Rebecca anxiously awaits a visit from a restaurant critic. Bar-room comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: The Sam in the Grey Flannel Suit
programme.desc: Rebecca is astounded to learn Sam has been promoted to an administrative position in the company that owns Cheers - until she realises they only want him to play on the corporate softball team. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part fact-based crime drama. Best friends Gagandip and Ravi fell in love with student doctor Mundill, a love triangle that destroyed their friendship and ultimately ended in what the headlines called the honeytrap murder. Gagandip attempted to sexually assault Mundill, who conspired with Ravi on a revenge plot that went horribly wrong. Starring Dee Ahluwalia, Ikky Kabir and Sasha Desouza-Willock

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzo's. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Flamin' Hot (2023)
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, Richard Montanez works as a cleaner in California for Frito Lay, the snack giant responsible for many popular brands. Montanez suggests a spicy twist to one of the company's most popular lines, giving birth to Flamin' Hot Cheetos, which becomes a pop culture phenomenon. Director Eva Longoria's fact-based comedy drama, starring Jesse Garcia and Annie Gonzalez

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. Jamie cooks a traybaked salmon in a bag, tomato fritters that can be prepared in a frying pan, and roasted rolled pork with a risotto that are both cooked in the same casserole pan

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives

programme.desc: Rebecca thinks that she is in with a chance with Evan Drake when he invites her and Sam for a weekend aboard his yacht. Comedy, starring Ted Danson, Kirstie Alley and Tom Skerritt

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea

programme.desc: Part one of two. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Cumbria, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit collector Paula, who badly needs some cash to fix her leaking roof. Henry picks a Morris Minor for restoration, while Simon turns some unwanted wood into furniture that seriously impresses independent valuer Ronnie Archer-Morgan

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a village in France officially open after two years of renovations. Cameras catch up with the man who rescued an abandoned hamlet in Spain who could now lose half of what he bought. Meanwhile, in Portugal, a couple start an animal sanctuary in their village

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul from south London has a lifelong dream to own a holiday home in the sun, where he can escape the winter and spend quality time with family and friends. Now that he's finally ready to take the leap, he's asked Ben Hillman to help him find the perfect property on Spain's southern Costa Blanca. He's also brought along his best friend Coral to help him with the search. Ben has five great options for Paul's budget of £80,000 - will any of them hit the mark?

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Liverpool man Lea reveals how 22 years ago he left a career in IT to move to Pasadena to run the Horse and Jockey pub and restaurant. Meanwhile, golf professional Peter is living the good life, earning much more money and working fewer hours doing a job he loves in the sunshine, and 74-year-old former estate agent Lynne from London is now enjoying life in The Villages - the largest retirement community in the world

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Montespieu, Louisa and Roger continue work on their Gingko Suite, but a shocking bathroom discovery could change everything. programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses

On the Costa Blanca, a more sizable sum is available to hunt out the perfect family villa for West Sussex couple Chris and Nicola and their three sons

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds

An inspirational garden design is also part of their ambitious dream, but even for the most experienced home renovators, the best-laid plans can go awry as a flood scuppers their plans

programme.title: Taskmaster

As if that wasn't enough, Kumail Nanjiani reveals his missing body part. Greg Davies dishes out the points

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Comedy starring Sam Campbell. A hotshot director scours the country for everyday people with feature film ideas before racing against the clock to turn the idea into reality in just three days. Sam and his elite team set about bringing Mick Hall's incomprehensible concept - featuring a detective and real snakes - to the big screen. But it turns out that some people don't make good actors, and snakes have a tendency to bite

programme.title: Make That Movie

programme.title: Love Cheats
programme.desc: The story of a man whose partner convinced him she had terminal cancer, and that she had a miscarriage. Romantic comedy, starring Jennifer Lopez, Milo Ventimiglia and Vanessa Hudgens

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

Why has John Robins attached oars to his arms? Why does Nick Mohammed keep winking at Alex Horne? Why is Sophie Willan making a wolf beatbox? Why is Steve Pemberton skinning a mannequin? programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bromley, south-east London, Jo and her discerning foodie partner Alex kick off proceedings with a fine dining menu but the guests are not impressed. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former footballer Steven hopes to give his demanding fiancee Kayleigh the Wag wedding of her dreams, and arranges for the nuptials to take place at Thorpe Park in Surrey . However, plans for a pre-ceremony ride on an 80mph rollercoaster and a reception at the nearby conference centre fail to meet the bride's high standards

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 27-year-old man from Essex hopes to give his fiancee and former boss in the Navy the wedding of her dreams. However, he is torn between the wishes of the bride, who wants him to take charge of organising the ceremony, and his best man, who encourages him to take a more laid-back approach to the task and return to the laddish ways of his past

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Rick Forman, founder and CEO of New Jersey-based discount clothing store Forman Mills, goes incognito among his own staff posing as a contestant on a reality show. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jessica Herrin, the founder and CEO of direct sales company Stella & Dot, goes undercover. She pretends to be a reality show contestant to access the workforce and find out whether her original vision for the firm is still being carried out as the organisation grows

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Rosanne's husband died recently and now she wants to find a smaller home where she can get back into her art. The brothers must brush away uninspiring interiors and use their artistic licence to turn her suburban home into a masterpiece

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Essex, married couple Karen and DJ Paul are first to host with their Ibiza-themed evening. They are joined by outdoorsy Lucy and her partner Paul, who is left hungry in every course. The third couple are Zimbabwean social worker Pat and her husband Tino who are blown away by the entertainment - but not so much by the food. On day two, Pat and Tino are determined to deliver a winning Zimbabwean evening with big portions to satisfy Paul. But their unconventional dessert of mashed sweet potato proves a little too adventurous for their guests. Finally, it's Lucy and Paul's chance to show off their outdoorsy grub but their menu involves a lot of cooking on the night, leaving them stressed out while their guests are waiting

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. As the series climax approaches, Little Alex Horne risks raising notoriously prickly Greg Davies' hackles with a task in celebration of himself. Sophie Willan is baffled by mirror writing, John Robins proves to be a talented tailor, Steve Pemberton has an expletive-laden row with a bin, Joanne McNally finds a novel use for a cow's ear, and Nick Mohammed brings a tear to Greg's eye

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson join forces with Jason Manford and Roisin Conaty respectively. Sam Simmons helps the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam tries to celebrate his birthday, but the evening is spoiled when Sheila Bloom, who is famously obsessed with her car, makes catty remarks about his vehicle. His father then reveals he used to date her years ago, upsetting Mum in the process. Finally, the family abandons dinner and heads to a Chinese restaurant, only for Sheila to reappear, forcing Dad to explain what the pair really got up to

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam is shocked to find his mother has set him up on a date by inviting Tanya Green to dinner, and his father has dressed in a suit for the occasion. Meanwhile, Jim is locked out of his house when his dog swallows his keys. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy tries to impress Toni with his new job in a music studio, while Mark is disappointed at being passed over for promotion. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark thinks a funeral is the perfect place to take Sophie on a date, while Jeremy gets friendly with a group of Christians, leading the pair to conclude that death and illness are the keys to a successful romance

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The Mediterranean pop-up parlour gets a visit from holiday tattoo collector Lewis, who was left with an unsightly tattoo on his bottom after a bender in Thailand, and club rep Jamiee, whose bungled boob job gets a lift. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Stockport serve up an inventive menu, a fresh, healthy series of dishes and a taste of Asia as they compete for the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Essex, with an eye on the £1,000 prize. The first couple to host are flight attendant Penny and doctors' surgery manager Chris. Their homely menu doesn't quite live up to the standards of bling-loving receptionist Tatia and her husband, metal worker Mick. The youngest duo, Lewis and Krystal, host on day two and manage to impress their older guests. Finally, it's Mick and Tatia's chance to show off their culinary skills with a fancy menu

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 30-year-old Newcastle man hopes to give his 26-year-old art-teacher fiancee the wedding of her dreams. The couple have been inseparable since they met five years ago while working behind a bar, but the groom's love of science fiction is at odds with the bride's sophisticated tastes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Anna, a 31-year-old support worker from Liverpool hopes to give her fiancee Sian the ceremony of her dreams. However, she struggles to set aside her tomboy tendencies and adapt to the feminine world of wedding planning, and best woman Jade threatens to be more of a hindrance than a help

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Armando Montelongo, the CEO of a Texas property investment company, is worried that the firm's rapid growth means he no longer has any interaction with the staff at the heart of his business. So he goes undercover to work alongside them and find out whether the business is operating as efficiently as possible

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Butler, the founder of one of America's most successful bakeries, dons a disguise to go incognito among her employees, posing as a contestant on a reality show. Gina is heavily involved in the creation of every recipe for the cupcakes sold in her stores and is keen to ensure each franchise is consistent in meeting her perfectionist standards

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Robert Popper's low-key comedy. Jonny is in a foul mood when he discovers a secret betrayal while reading Adam's childhood diary - and vows to get revenge. Starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Grandma introduces the family to her new boyfriend, but the old curmudgeon quickly upsets everyone with his rude behaviour. Dad cannot stand him and hides in his shed, but nobody is prepared for what happens when the guest suddenly loses his temper. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: Peep Show

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire confronts neighbours from hell Ronnie and Amber about the eyesore of a boat on their front lawn - and when they refuse to move it, Phil has no alternative but to call in the big guns - dad Frank and a few of his retired pals. Meanwhile, Cam takes Lily to clown school

Meanwhile, Diaz and Santiago have trouble taking a costumed crimefighter seriously, and Holt faces a challenge to his leadership

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is stuck at an airport and needs to track down Haley, who has gone missing following an argument, so she logs on to her laptop and checks in with the rest of the family in the hope of making amends with her daughter. Julie Bowen stars in a novel episode filmed entirely on Apple devices, with Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Sarah Hyland

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Claire shoot an advert to rival a competitor's catchy new campaign - but creative differences threaten to tear the father and daughter apart. Phil, Luke and Manny join forces to take down a Peeping Tom who has been using a drone to spy on a sunbathing Gloria, Cam worries about Lily's lack of singing skills ahead of a talent show, and Haley has a confession for Andy when he's rushed to hospital with appendicitis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: At the Springfield library, Marge stimulates the children's interest in history by relating extraordinary tales featuring the wives of Henry VIII, the Lewis and Clark expedition and the early life of Austrian composer Mozart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart grows frustrated by Homer's lack of interest in him and sets out to search for a new father figure. Lisa tries to break her addiction to an expensive teenage chat-line, but finds it harder than expected

programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recipe developer Mimi is looking for a fun-loving fellow creative and her date with rugby referee and sausage roll-maker Joel starts well when he turns up with a gift for her. Theatre producer Sue, meets American psychologist Beri, who is looking for an English rose, while rugby player Dan seems to tick all of Irish model Laura's boxes, but when she finds out what he does for a living, things could take a turn for the worse

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, Gabby works out if she had a future with Joel, PK attempts to show a different side to his character

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Who Are You Going to Telephone?
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Liam and Lynn, best man Simon and bridesmaid Kirsty are reunited on camera for the first time since their Alien Autopsy wedding in 2013

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire thinks Luke is up to no good with his friends, so she persuades a reluctant Phil into helping her spy on their son. Gloria is suspicious of Jay when he starts moaning amorously in his sleep and Mitch struggles to keep a secret from Cam

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Jay and Luke wage war against three generations of Thorpes, including Phil's arch- rival Gil. Mitch and Cam ask Claire to collect Lily from school - but forget to mention the outbreak of head lice - and Gloria chaperones a field trip, giving her cause to worry about Manny's lack of self-confidence

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homer's delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes part in a new reality TV show set in the 19th century, which proves unpopular with viewers, prompting the producers to try a series of increasingly desperate and dangerous ploys in a bid to boost ratings. With the guest voice of former boxer Larry Holmes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is the target of a mysterious murder attempt at a sauna, so Chief Wiggum orders Sideshow Bob's early release from prison to help identify the culprit. Featuring the guest voice of Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart takes pity on Mrs Krabappel and nominates her for the prestigious Teacher of the Year competition held in Florida, making Principal Skinner fear she will find another job if she wins. With the guest voice of Little Richard

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley turns 21, so the adults hit a bar, where Claire is desperate to appear more of a pal than a nagging, uptight mum, and Cameron and Mitchell are distressed when their 'cool' credentials come up short. Phil and Jay's quick pitstop to buy a present takes a disastrous turn, too, while back at home, Alex, Manny and Luke are left to babysit Lily

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Manny are on their way back from breakfast at the pancake house when Phil is forced to swerve out of the way of an oncoming truck, a brush with death that prompts them all to re-evaulate their lives. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire confronts neighbours from hell Ronnie and Amber about the eyesore of a boat on their front lawn - and when they refuse to move it, Phil has no alternative but to call in the big guns - dad Frank and a few of his retired pals. Meanwhile, Cam takes Lily to clown school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes it hard when Luke gives him the 'teenage cold shoulder' - a day he always knew was coming - so he goes in search of a stand-in son. A dilemma presents itself for Jay when Gloria suspects Joe is allergic to Stella, while Mitchell does some freelance legal work for Claire, an experience he finds rather enlightening

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge remember the ups and downs of their marriage through a series of flashbacks, including the time they each began flirting with guests at a glamorous party - a situation that led to a food fight and an unexpected swim in the pool

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield is the setting for parodies of Mad Men, Michael Bay's Transformers and It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown in this Halloween-themed episode. Homer's vote on election day is misread by a renegade machine, Lisa's Malibu Stacy car turns into a robot determined to start a war, and a giant pumpkin seeks revenge

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma decides to take her Aunt Gladys's advice and start a family - but a day in charge of Bart and Lisa at a beer-themed amusement park soon changes her mind

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities get their final consultations, David and Coleen head to the farm with their dates, while Lucinda decides who meets her emotional and physical desires

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Student Leah is on her first-ever date and sits down for a meal with Ashley from Huddersfield, who has hair to rival Harry Styles and a winning superstar smile. Liverpudlian welder Daniel lacks confidence with woman, but bonds with student midwife Emily over their shared passion for romcom films, while Antonia hopes to meet a man who wants to get to know the woman behind the uniform, but finds it difficult to let her guard down when she meets 34-year-old rugby player Pete

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Coronation Street, Antiques Roadshow, Frozen Planet II, Kings of Pain, Help! My House Is Haunted, Only Connect, and ITV News coverage of the mini-budget

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities get their final consultations, David and Coleen head to the farm with their dates, while Lucinda decides who meets her emotional and physical desires

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is determined to make friends with her reserved and softly spoken neighbours, the Kremps, so she bombards them with invitations to a barbecue. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica battle for control of the family's telephone line and beg their parents to get a second one installed. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly reignites a long-standing feud after she invites Murray's unreliable brother to visit at Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Adam upsets the balance of power between him and Barry after he wins a ball game between them for the first time. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Kev, his ex-paratrooper best man Sam, bride Trish and her best friend Charlene join together to relive one of the most turbulent weddings in the show's history

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire's plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Blackpool compete to win the £1,000 prize, including former dancer Rowan and businessman John, who start the proceedings. Also vying to win are Sally and Joanne who hope to impress their guests with an unusual menu that features a Tandoori Tower and a belly-busting breakfast, before competitive duo Holly and Ollie pull out all the stops in an attempt to secure the cash

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The adults take a trip to Las Vegas, where Jay wheels and deals to get them some better rooms - including their very own British butler, played by Stephen Merchant. Phil spends most of his time with his magician heroes - neglecting Claire in the process - and Mitch runs into an ex-boyfriend he dumped by e-mail, although it all seems fine when he invites Mitch and Cam to his bachelor party

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Plans for a relaxed evening at Jay's turn out to be anything but when Claire is mad with her dad over his lack of gratitude for her holding the fort at work and Mitchell is busy scheming after receiving a gift he doesn't like. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria stop off at her old salon and get scissor-happy when a stylist fails to show up

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders' advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart learns that he was once a child celebrity, but that Homer spent all the money he made, so he separates from his parents and moves into a loft apartment, where his neighbours are punk band Blink-182 and skateboarding hero Tony Hawk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I'm Spelling as Fast as I Can
programme.desc: Homer develops a ravenous appetite for Krustyburger's new spare rib sandwich, while Lisa is offered a scholarship at the college of her choice - but only if she agrees to deliberately lose a spelling contest

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's new girlfriend gives his self-confidence a boost, but Peralta is forced to intervene before his colleague gets too serious, too soon in the relationship. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

Disaster movie, starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, Genevieve Bujold, Richard Roundtree and George Kennedy

Crime thriller, starring Mark Wahlberg, Kate Beckinsale, Giovanni Ribisi and Ben Foster

programme.desc: Battle-hardened Crusader Robin of Loxley and his Moorish commander launch an audacious rebellion against the corrupt English crown. However, they face tough competition from the twisted Sheriff of Nottingham. Director Otto Bathurst, who also worked on Peaky Blinders and His Dark Materials, delivers his take on the classic adventure yarn. Taron Egerton plays the heroic outlaw, with Jamie Foxx, Ben Mendelsohn and Tim Minchin also starring

programme.desc: Two estranged brothers are drawn to enter a mixed martial arts tournament, one a military veteran looking for a way to escape his troubled past, the other a struggling teacher who needs the prize money to support his family. Action adventure, with Stanley Weber and Annabelle Wallis

programme.desc: The Rangers hunt for a serial killer who is murdering federal agents and the investigation reaches its climax when Walker must rescue Alex from the clutches of the criminal

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: Retired soldier Benjamin Martin, who turned his back on the military to become a farmer in South Carolina, takes up arms once more to avenge the unprovoked murder of his son at the hands of the British during the American War of Independence. As he seeks vengeance, he finds himself up against a sadistic officer wreaking havoc in the surrounding area. Roland Emmerich's action adventure, starring Mel Gibson, Jason Isaacs, Heath Ledger and Joely Richardson.

programme.title: Memorial Day (2011)
programme.desc: A Second World War veteran offers to tell his grandson the stories behind his service in the conflict. Years later, the child has grown up to also become a soldier, and finds the old man's tales help him to cope with the challenges he faces serving in Iraq. Drama, starring Jonathan Bennett and James Cromwell, with his real-life son John playing his character as a younger man

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
